title: Robin Hood
questions: How much do you know about the story of Robin Hood?
What do you think of Robin Hood? Was he a criminal or a hero?
Robin Hood's intentions were good. To what extent does this justify his actions? Does the end ever justify the means?
Have you ever stolen anything? If so, why? What happened next?
Do you give money to beggars? Why/not?
If you won the lottery jackpot would you give any of your winnings to charity? If so, how much? Which charity or charities would you prioritise and why?
How much money would you need to be happy?
What does your country do to help the poor? What more can people do?
Should the mega-rich be allowed to pass all their riches on to their children when they die? Why/not?
What are the disadvantages of being extremely rich?
What would you do if you found a large sum of money (e.g. enough to buy a new car) in the street?
What is more important to you - wealth or success? Why?
